_comment: Fictional example showing the JSON shape the build script expects. All names, dates, figures, and stakeholders here are invented for documentation purposes — replace every value when authoring a real customer success plan.

customer.name: ExampleCo
customer.tagline: Driving adoption across API, AI, and Developer Experience

objectives.title: Strategic Objectives Driving the Program
objectives.subtitle: ExampleCo's priority outcomes for the platform modernization journey
objectives.takeaway: These priorities are how we measure ExampleCo's modernization, AI readiness, and platform consolidation through the renewal cycle.

items.heading: MODERNIZE THE MEMBER EXPERIENCE
bullets: Bring product surfaces to parity with the consumer apps members already use
Standardize how new APIs ship so engineering can deliver faster

items.heading: MAKE AI A FIRST-LINE CAPABILITY
bullets: Stand up AI Gateway as a managed runway so AI use cases ship safely
Govern LLM traffic, cost, and policy from day one rather than retrofitting later

items.heading: CONSOLIDATE AND STANDARDIZE THE API PLATFORM
items.bullets: Retire the legacy gateway, unify all APIs on Kong, and standardize the Developer Portal and Service Catalog so every team ships the same way.

items.title: AI Gateway Adoption
bullets: Schedule the AI use-case session with the platform owners
Move AI Gateway from configured to first production use case
Schedule the next gateway version upgrade for plugin readiness

items.title: Insomnia Adoption
bullets: Diagnose blocker: awareness, workflow, or substitute tool
Convert the existing seat license into active developer usage
Set a target seat utilization for the renewal cycle

items.title: Gateway Optimization and Legacy Consolidation
bullets: Audit Konnect orgs and control planes against the contract
Identify the owners of services still on the legacy gateway
Open a consolidation conversation tied to the next renewal

items.title: Developer Portal Modernization
bullets: Identify the consumers of the existing portals
Migrate from the deprecated portal experience to the current one
Open a Service Catalog scorecards conversation

items.title: AI Gateway
bullets: Bottleneck: platform owner not yet engaging the AI build team
Play: schedule the working session with the right stakeholders
Escalate to the executive sponsor if the working session slips

items.title: Insomnia
bullets: Bottleneck: zero internal enablement; admin-only adoption
Play: run an adoption diagnostic before recommending paid services
Hold paid ILT in reserve until the real blocker is known

items.title: Legacy Consolidation
bullets: Bottleneck: no incentive to migrate services off the legacy gateway
Play: get the executive sponsor to introduce the legacy owners directly
Frame on cost, security surface, and skill duplication

items.title: Developer Portal
bullets: Bottleneck: old portal forgotten; consumers unknown
Play: audit who reads each deployed portal
Walk the platform owner through the new portal; tee up the upsell
